features.name: Instruction Store
features.description: Persist decoded or scanned instruction facts with address, size, bytes, mnemonic, operands, function and block linkage.

features.name: Basic Block Store
features.description: Persist basic blocks, address ranges, function ownership, terminator classification and confidence.

features.name: Native CFG Edges
features.description: Persist control-flow edges between basic blocks and expose them through object graph queries.

features.name: Instruction-Driven Xrefs
features.description: Use decoded immediates, relocation hints and import thunks to generate code/data/import references.

features.name: Graph Lab CFG Mode
features.description: Add explicit CFG/callgraph/xref graph modes to the TUI.

features.name: Native Analyzer Capability Matrix
features.description: Track architecture support, confidence levels, unsupported features and diagnostics in project metadata.
